title: Net farm management deposits or repayments
description: How to report your net farm management deposits and repayments in myTax.

content_blocks.text: This section is for primary producers only.
If you made farm management deposits (FMD) or had repayments during 2015–16, see Net farm management deposits or repayments before completing this section.

items: your account statement from your FMD provider
Add up your deductible deposits you made in 2015 – 16, and enter the total into Deductible deposits .
Add up your early repayments you withdrew during 2015 – 16 that qualify for a natural disaster exception, and enter the total into Early repayments – natural disaster .
Add up FMDs you held for 12 months or more that were repaid during 2015 – 16, and enter the total into Other repayments .

content_text:
This section is for primary producers only.
If you made farm management deposits (FMD) or had repayments during 2015–16, see Net farm management deposits or repayments before completing this section.
## Completing this section
You may need:
- your account statement from your FMD provider
- Information for primary producers
- Farm management deposits scheme .
- Add up your deductible deposits you made in 2015 – 16, and enter the total into Deductible deposits .
- Add up your early repayments you withdrew during 2015 – 16 that qualify for a natural disaster exception, and enter the total into Early repayments – natural disaster .
- Add up FMDs you held for 12 months or more that were repaid during 2015 – 16, and enter the total into Other repayments .
- Select Save .
- Select Save and continue .
